name: Product Hero (Clean Background)
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] Professional product photograph of [PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION] centered on a clean [PRIMARY_BG_COLOR] background, [LIGHTING_STYLE], sharp detail, the product label clearly visible with [BRAND_DISTINCTIVE_FEATURES], subtle [ACCENT_COLOR] color accents in the composition, [ASPECT_RATIO_NOTE]
description: Clean product shot on a solid background with brand-appropriate styling

name: Product Lifestyle Shot
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] Lifestyle photograph of [PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION] in a natural setting that reflects [TARGET_AUDIENCE_LIFESTYLE], [PHOTOGRAPHY_STYLE], warm natural lighting, shallow depth of field, the product is the focal point surrounded by contextual props, [MOOD_DESCRIPTION]
description: Product in a lifestyle setting that resonates with the target audience

name: Bold Headline Ad
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] A bold, eye-catching static ad design with a [PRIMARY_BG_COLOR] background. Large [HEADLINE_FONT_STYLE] headline text reading "[HEADLINE_TEXT]" in [HEADLINE_COLOR]. Smaller subheadline below reading "[SUBHEADLINE_TEXT]" in [BODY_TEXT_COLOR]. [CTA_BUTTON_STYLE] button at the bottom reading "[CTA_TEXT]" in [CTA_COLOR]. Clean, modern ad layout, no clutter
description: Bold text-heavy ad with headline, subheadline, and CTA button

name: Testimonial Card
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] A clean testimonial card design on a [SECONDARY_BG_COLOR] background. Five gold stars at the top. Large quotation marks in [ACCENT_COLOR]. Testimonial text reading "[TESTIMONIAL_QUOTE]" in [BODY_TEXT_COLOR] with [BODY_FONT_STYLE] font. Attribution at bottom: "[CUSTOMER_NAME], [CUSTOMER_TITLE]" in smaller [ACCENT_COLOR] text. Subtle [BRAND_COLOR] border or accent line
description: Customer testimonial card with stars, quote, and attribution

name: Us vs Them Comparison
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] A split-screen comparison ad. Left side labeled "[COMPETITOR_LABEL]" with a muted, desaturated look and [NEGATIVE_POINTS]. Right side labeled "[BRAND_NAME]" with vibrant [PRIMARY_COLOR] branding and [POSITIVE_POINTS]. Clear visual contrast between the two sides. [HEADLINE_FONT_STYLE] text, modern ad layout, the brand side clearly more appealing

name: UGC-Style Selfie Post
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] A natural, candid-looking selfie-style photograph of a [TARGET_DEMOGRAPHIC] person holding [PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION], genuine smile, slightly imperfect framing like a real social media post, natural indoor lighting, [PHOTOGRAPHY_STYLE], the product label clearly visible, authentic and relatable feel, no studio lighting
description: Authentic-looking UGC selfie with the product

name: Statistic Callout
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] A bold statistic callout ad with [PRIMARY_BG_COLOR] background. Large numbers reading "[STAT_NUMBER]" in [ACCENT_COLOR] with [HEADLINE_FONT_STYLE] font, very prominent. Supporting text below: "[STAT_CONTEXT]" in [BODY_TEXT_COLOR]. Small [BRAND_NAME] logo or wordmark in corner. Clean, data-driven design that builds trust
description: Bold statistic with supporting context for social proof

name: Before & After
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] A before-and-after transformation ad. Left side labeled "BEFORE" showing [BEFORE_STATE] in muted, cool tones. Right side labeled "AFTER" showing [AFTER_STATE] in warm, vibrant tones. Arrow or dividing line between them in [ACCENT_COLOR]. [PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION] subtly shown at the bottom. Dramatic but believable transformation

name: Feature Benefits Grid
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] A clean 2x2 grid ad layout on [PRIMARY_BG_COLOR] background. Four benefit icons with labels: "[BENEFIT_1]" with check icon, "[BENEFIT_2]" with check icon, "[BENEFIT_3]" with check icon, "[BENEFIT_4]" with check icon. All in [BODY_TEXT_COLOR] with [ACCENT_COLOR] icons. Headline at top: "[HEADLINE_TEXT]" in [HEADLINE_COLOR]. Brand logo at bottom center
description: Grid layout showing four key product benefits

name: Offer / Promotion
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] A promotional offer ad with [PRIMARY_BG_COLOR] background. Large text showing "[OFFER_TEXT]" (e.g. 25% OFF) in [ACCENT_COLOR] bold [HEADLINE_FONT_STYLE]. Supporting text: "[OFFER_DETAILS]" in [BODY_TEXT_COLOR]. Prominent [CTA_BUTTON_STYLE] button reading "[CTA_TEXT]". Urgency element: "[URGENCY_TEXT]" in smaller text. [PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION] shown below the offer
description: Promotional offer with discount, urgency, and CTA

name: Editorial / Press Style
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] An editorial-style press ad resembling a magazine feature. Clean white or cream background. "As featured in" or "[PRESS_HEADLINE]" in elegant serif font at top. [PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION] photographed in [PHOTOGRAPHY_STYLE] in the center. Pull quote: "[EDITORIAL_QUOTE]" in italic text below. Publication-style layout with generous whitespace, premium and trustworthy feel

name: Ingredient Spotlight
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] An ingredient spotlight ad with [SECONDARY_BG_COLOR] background. Close-up of [KEY_INGREDIENT] in its natural form, beautifully photographed with [LIGHTING_STYLE]. Text overlay: "[INGREDIENT_NAME]" in [HEADLINE_COLOR] with [HEADLINE_FONT_STYLE]. Supporting text: "[INGREDIENT_BENEFIT]" in [BODY_TEXT_COLOR]. [PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION] shown small in the corner, linking the ingredient to the product
description: Spotlight on a key ingredient with benefit explanation

name: Stories / Reels Format
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] A vertical 9:16 format ad optimized for stories and reels. [PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION] shown large in center with [PHOTOGRAPHY_STYLE]. Bold headline "[HEADLINE_TEXT]" in [HEADLINE_COLOR] at top. Swipe-up CTA at bottom: "[CTA_TEXT]" in [CTA_COLOR]. Dynamic, mobile-first composition with text safe zones respected, [PRIMARY_BG_COLOR] background gradient
description: Vertical format optimized for Stories and Reels

name: Faux Review Screenshot
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] A realistic-looking product review screenshot design. White background mimicking a review platform. Five gold stars prominently shown. Review title: "[REVIEW_TITLE]" in bold dark text. Review body: "[REVIEW_BODY]" in regular dark text. Reviewer name: "[REVIEWER_NAME]" with a 'Verified Purchase' badge in green. Subtle [BRAND_COLOR] accent at top and bottom borders
description: Realistic review screenshot design for social proof

name: Brand Manifesto
template: [IMAGE_PROMPT_MODIFIER] A brand manifesto ad with [PRIMARY_BG_COLOR] background. Centered text layout with generous whitespace. Opening line: "[MANIFESTO_OPENING]" in large [HEADLINE_FONT_STYLE] [HEADLINE_COLOR] text. Body: "[MANIFESTO_BODY]" in [BODY_TEXT_COLOR] [BODY_FONT_STYLE]. Closing with brand name "[BRAND_NAME]" in [ACCENT_COLOR]. Minimal design, no images, pure typography, powerful and aspirational
description: Text-only brand manifesto ad with powerful typography
